title: Mending Levels
description: Adds levels to the mending enchantment (higher level = more efficient xp conversion)
body:
#### A simple mod that allows you to change the maximum enchantment level for mending

## Features:
- Fully configurable! (You can change the maximum mending level)
- That's literally it, it's a simple mod

### Official forge port: [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mending-levels-forge)
